title: Property Valuation II
outline: This course aims to develop an understanding of: Income approach to valuation (direct capitalisation, discounted cashflow method, accounts method, valuation of leaseholds); cost approach to valuation (depreciated replacement cost method); residual method of valuation; valuation of shopping centres, valuation of commercial property (including offices, shops, mixed -use), valuation of industrial property (warehouses and light industrial), valuation of customary/indigenous property; and South African valuation case-law
lecture_times: See departmental timetable and official class schedule.
dp_requirements: Please refer to the official course handout document for detailed information regarding the DP requirements for this course.
assessment: Please refer to the official course handout document regarding the assessment criteria for this course.
